evidence_spans.span:
Maximum likelihood estimation uses the log-likelihood as its objective and selects a parameter value that maximizes it:

\[
\widehat{\theta}_{\mathrm{MLE}} = \operatorname*{arg\,max}_{\theta}\, \ell(\theta).
\]

results.rationale: The Maximum Likelihood Estimator Formula explicitly defines the parameter value selected by Maximum Likelihood Estimation, thus formalizing the method.
